subtasks.title: Add symlink check and os.path.commonpath validation to _serve_static
subtasks.description: Fix the path traversal vulnerability in backend/server.py _serve_static method. Add symlink detection: reject requests where the resolved file_path or any of its parent directories is a symlink. Add secondary validation using os.path.commonpath to ensure the resolved file path is strictly within DASHBOARD_DIR. Update the existing parents check to work alongside these new validations.
acceptanceCriteria: _serve_static rejects paths where file_path.resolve() contains symlinks
_serve_static uses os.path.commonpath for secondary path containment validation
Normal static file serving (non-symlink files within DASHBOARD_DIR) continues to work
Path traversal attempts (e.g., ../../../etc/passwd) are still blocked with 403

subtasks.title: Add unit tests for path traversal and symlink bypass scenarios
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive tests in tests/test_server_auth.py (or a new test file) covering: (1) normal static file access within DASHBOARD_DIR, (2) path traversal attempts with ../ sequences, (3) symlink-based path traversal bypass attempts, (4) edge cases like accessing DASHBOARD_DIR itself, (5) paths that pass parents check but fail commonpath check. Use temporary directories and mock symlinks to avoid depending on the real filesystem layout.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests cover normal file access within DASHBOARD_DIR
Tests cover ../ path traversal attempts returning 403
Tests cover symlink-based bypass attempts returning 403
Tests cover edge case where file_path == dashboard_root

subtasks.title: Run full test suite and verify no regressions
subtasks.description: Run the complete test suite (pytest) to ensure the changes to _serve_static do not break any existing functionality. Run lint/typecheck if available. Verify all existing server auth tests still pass.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing tests in tests/test_server_auth.py pass
All tests in the full test suite pass
Lint/typecheck passes with no new errors
No regressions in static file serving behavior
